title: Spain Denies U.S. Military Use of Its Bases for Iran Attack
summary_full: The leftist government in Madrid said the war against Iran violated both international law and the agreement between Spain and the United States on the use of air bases.
summary_public: The leftist government in Madrid said the war against Iran violated both international law and the agreement between Spain and the United States on the use of air bases.
